steps.title: Focus on quartz
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize quartz's hardness in relation to other minerals. The notes show quartz has a Mohs number of 7, above apatite's 5 and below diamond's 10.

steps.title: Reject off-target choices
steps.content: A centers on diamond rather than quartz. B compares diamond and apatite without mentioning quartz. C describes the general ordering system but does not state where quartz stands relative to the others. The answer is D.
